title: clethra fagifolia var. fagifolia
intro: Clethra fagifolia var. fagifolia, also known as the mountain sweetpea or mountain clethra, is a deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clethra fagifolia var. fagifolia include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making a tea or infusion from its leaves, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, or making a tincture to use as a topical treatment.
